questions.question: A cargo ship can transport $480$ containers of goods. If each container holds $12$ crates, how many crates can the ship transport in total, and what is the remainder when divided by $9$?
A truck driver needs to deliver $945$ packages to a warehouse. If he delivers them in batches of $15$, how many batches can he make, and what is the remainder?
A traffic light cycle lasts $120$ seconds. How many times will it cycle in $18$ minutes, using $2$ as a divisor?
A logistics company has $270$ parcels to ship. If they are shipped in boxes of $9$, how many boxes can be filled, and what is the remainder?
A delivery service needs to divide $216$ packages among $12$ vans. What is the quotient and remainder when $216$ is divided by $12$?
A bus travels $630$ miles in one day. If it travels the same route $5$ times a week, how many miles does it travel per week using $5$ as a divisor?
A shipping company has $504$ boxes of cargo. If they are packed in containers that hold $8$ boxes each, how many containers can be filled, and what is the remainder?
A train travels $810$ miles from one station to another. If it makes $5$ stops along the way, and each stop takes the same amount of time, what is the remainder when $810$ is divided by $5$?

A delivery truck can carry $120$ crates at a time. If $945$ crates need to be delivered to a warehouse, how many trips must the truck make, and what is the remainder? Show your work and explain your reasoning.

A logistics company needs to pack $2400$ boxes of goods into containers that hold $16$ boxes each. What is the quotient and remainder when $2400$ is divided by $16$? Use long division to find the answer, and provide a brief explanation of the division algorithm used.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Encourage students to use real-world examples to illustrate their reasoning.
Tip 2: Remind students to show all work and explain their thought process for free-response questions.
Tip 3: Emphasize the importance of accuracy and attention to detail in calculations.
